name: skills
description: Small, focused Claude Code skills: prose linting (slop-cop), second opinions (codex), and repo scaffolding (repo-bootstrap).

plugins.name: slop-cop
plugins.description: Run slop-cop on a file to catch LLM-generated prose tells.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from OpenAI Codex CLI on hard debugging, analysis, or architecture problems.

plugins.name: repo-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap new projects and repos with base conventions plus an opinionated Python packaging layer.
